item.title: cloud-hypervisor / cloud-hypervisor
item.description:
Desc: A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.
Lang: Rust
